tool_name: Structural Steel Beam — Combined Bending, Shear & Lateral-Torsional Buckling Check

inputs.name: Applied Factored Shear Force (V_u / V_Ed)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Elastic Section Modulus About Strong Axis (S_x / W_el,y)
Plastic Section Modulus About Strong Axis (Z_x / W_pl,y)
Web Shear Area (A_w)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Steel Yield Strength (F_y / f_y)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Unbraced Length of Compression Flange (L_b)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Limiting Laterally Unbraced Length for Full Plasticity (L_p)
inputs.note: From section tables or AISC 360 F2-5: L_p = 1.76·r_y·√(E/F_y)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Limiting Laterally Unbraced Length for Inelastic LTB (L_r)
inputs.note: From section tables or AISC 360 F2-6
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

formulas: M_p_knm = Z_x_cm3 * 1e-6 * Fy_mpa * 1000   // [kN·m] Nominal Plastic Moment Capacity (M_p) Reference: AISC 360-22 F2-1 / EC3 §6.2.5

M_n_knm = (Lb_m <= Lp_m) ? M_p_knm : (Lb_m >= Lr_m) ? (0.877 * Math.PI^2 * 200000 / ((Lb_m*1000)^2) * S_x_cm3 * 1e-6 * 1000) : (M_p_knm - (M_p_knm - 0.7*Fy_mpa*S_x_cm3*1e-6*1000) * (Lb_m - Lp_m)/(Lr_m - Lp_m))   // [kN·m] LTB-Reduced Nominal Moment Capacity (M_n) Reference: AISC 360-22 F2-2 (plastic), F2-3 (inelastic LTB), F2-4 (elastic LTB)
phi_Mn_knm = 0.9 * M_n_knm   // [kN·m] Design Moment Capacity (φM_n — LRFD) Reference: AISC 360-22 F1 — φ_b = 0.90
V_n_kn = 0.6 * Fy_mpa * Aw_cm2 * 1e-4 * 1000   // [kN] Nominal Shear Capacity (V_n) Reference: AISC 360-22 G2-1 — web shear yielding (C_v1 = 1.0 for compact web)
phi_Vn_kn = 1.0 * V_n_kn   // [kN] Design Shear Capacity (φV_n — LRFD) Reference: AISC 360-22 G1 — φ_v = 1.0 for rolled I-sections

DCR_moment = M_demand_knm / phi_Mn_knm; DCR_shear = V_demand_kn / phi_Vn_kn; DCR_combined = Math.max(DCR_moment, DCR_shear)   // [dimensionless] Combined Utilization Ratios Reference: AISC 360-22 — demand-capacity ratio; ≤ 1.0 required

V1.error_msg: L_r must exceed L_p — verify section table data inputs

V2.error_msg: Bending demand exceeds capacity: increase section depth, add lateral bracing, or use higher-grade steel

V3.error_msg: Shear demand exceeds capacity: increase web area (deeper section) or add web stiffeners

smart_warnings.message: Section overstressed: structural failure mode risk — do not proceed to fabrication without redesign
Unbraced length in elastic LTB zone: significant capacity reduction — add lateral restraints at midspan
High bending utilization with LTB active: consider intermediate bracing to restore full plastic capacity
High-strength steel with long unbraced length: LTB controls over yielding — bracing at L_p intervals mandatory
High shape factor (> 1.20): significant plastic reserve — verify section compactness per AISC Table B4.1b
High combined loading: check shear-moment interaction per AISC 360-22 G2 for non-compact webs

fmea.effect: L_r must exceed L_p — verify section table data inputs
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Bending demand exceeds capacity: increase section depth, add lateral bracing, or use higher-grade steel
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Shear demand exceeds capacity: increase web area (deeper section) or add web stiffeners
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Section overstressed: structural failure mode risk — do not proceed to fabrication without redesign
Unbraced length in elastic LTB zone: significant capacity reduction — add lateral restraints at midspan
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Lb_m > Lr_m

fmea.failureMode: High bending utilization with LTB active: consider intermediate bracing to restore full plastic capacity
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: DCR_moment > 0.85 && Lb_m > Lp_m

fmea.failureMode: High-strength steel with long unbraced length: LTB controls over yielding — bracing at L_p intervals mandatory
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Fy_mpa > 450 && Lb_m > 3

fmea.failureMode: High shape factor (> 1.20): significant plastic reserve — verify section compactness per AISC Table B4.1b
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Z_x_cm3 / S_x_cm3 > 1.20

fmea.failureMode: High combined loading: check shear-moment interaction per AISC 360-22 G2 for non-compact webs
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: DCR_shear > 0.7 && DCR_moment > 0.7
